title: ateleia venezuelensis
intro: Ateleia venezuelensis is a type of plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ateleia venezuelensis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
